hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */job_pipeline/*|job_pipeline/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: if this change altered the job_pipeline architecture or approach (dropped/added a strategy, swapped a dependency, changed the discovery or category-detection flow, etc.), check whether job_pipeline_brief.md needs updating to match."}}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
